keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY GUMS. Gums : Bor., Carb-v., Kre., Merc., Nux-v., Stap. Gums, upper : Calc-c., Rut. Gums, lower : Sars. Gums, inner : Pho., Stap. Gums, alternating sides : Aeth. Gums, bleeding : Pho-ac., Stap. Gums, boring : Merc. Gums, excoriated : Carb-v., Sep. Gums, receding : Carb-v., Merc. Gums, sore : Carb-v., Merc. Gums, suppurating , pyorrha : Calc-c., Carb-v., Cist., Hep., Merc., Pho., Pul. , Sil., Stap. Gums, swelled : Merc., Nux-v., Sep., Stap., Sul. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
